subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1912-12-26 in London
subcodes.first_line: Existence itself consists of perpetual permanence. Show me something that does not exist perpetually!... This reincarnation in which people have traditionally believed is contrary to what has been revealed in the Books of God
subcodes.first_line_orig: وجود بقای ابدی دارد چیزی نشان بدهید که ابدی نباشد نهایت درجات و انتقالات دارد
subcodes.subjects: @reincarnation, @law of transformation and change, @light and darkness, @existence and nonexistence; preexistence, @infinity and eternity
